author: omerfirmak
content: zevm says these blocks are invalid but only because it uses a different sender for these txns and ends up tripping on the witness validation.

author: omerfirmak
content: and it derives the sender by simply hashing the public key.

author: omerfirmak
content: tests should probably modify the signature instead of pk

author: omerfirmak
content: so that the block is only invalid if the guest does signature verification against pk or ecrecover
